source_lineage: openai/parameter-golf#2135 (codemath3000, 2026-05-01) -> port AsymLogit Rescale + Token-Only N-gram Tilt to IGLA stack
source_compliance_precedents: openai/parameter-golf#1514 (merged) — Token-Only N-gram tilt legality: WITHIN_TAU/WITHIN_BOOST/WORD_TAU/WORD_BOOST/AGREE_ADD_BOOST forbidden
task: Re-evaluate every format x algo cell in the IGLA matrix with the AsymLogit+Ngram stack added on top of the existing trainer-igla pipeline. Reference baseline: trios#446 comment 4370442020 (38 cells, 19 formats, 2 algos).

token_only_ngram_tilt.compliance_class: C1 strict-causal token-only channel; within/word channels disabled; logits += boost then softmax
token_only_ngram_tilt.char_level_note: TOKEN_ORDER reduced from 16 (parameter-golf SP8192) to 8 (IGLA char-level alphabet ~65). Hyperparam sweep deferred to L-NG2.

compliance_gates.C1_causality: Within-word and word-start channels disabled. Logs MUST emit `within_gate=0 word_gate=0 agree2plus=0` for every seed. Only `token_hint` channel may fire.
compliance_gates.C2_normalization: logit += boost; softmax renormalizes. Probability mass conserved by construction.
compliance_gates.C3_no_ttt_for_now: TTT path NOT ported in Wave-9. Score-first TTT is post-Gate-2 work.
compliance_gates.C4_single_pass: Each validation char contributes exactly one BPB term. No re-scoring.
compliance_gates.C5_no_validation_leak: N-gram statistics computed on training corpus only. No val-derived precomputation.
compliance_gates.C6_artifact_floor: ARCHITECTURAL_FLOOR_BPB=2.19 cull guard remains active. Cells above 2.19 not culled until plateau confirmed (5 ticks in 0.005 band, step >= 50_000).

expected_outcome_per_format: AsymLogit alone: small monotone improvement (~0.01-0.03 BPB) for high-bit formats (binary32, gf16, bf16). N-gram tilt closed-form: char-level alphabet means lower TOKEN_ORDER; effect likely smaller than parameter-golf token-level (-0.01 nats vs PR#2130 -> char-level bound: order 0.001-0.005 BPB). Combined stack: cells crossing 1.85 are unlikely without additional architectural changes.
deliverables: PhD coordinate matrix update in trios#446 comment with 19 new cells (delta column vs 2026-05-04 baseline)
ONE SHOT close-out: lanes L-AL1, L-NG1, L-W9 all DONE with merged PR + CI green
